source_pr.title: executor: fix firstrow/max/min(bit col) error
source_pr.body:
## What have you changed? (mandatory)
Before this PR:
``` sql
CREATE TABLE `t` (
  `a` bit(1) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`a`)
);
insert into t value(1);
select max(a) from t group by a;
```
we'll get panic
```
lastCmd select max( a) from t group by
a, runtime error: index out of range
```

After this PR:
``` sql
tidb> select max(a) from t group by a;
+---+
| a |
+---+
|  |
+---+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)
```


## What is the type of the changes? (mandatory)

- Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)

## How has this PR been tested? (mandatory)
integration test

## Does this PR affect documentation (docs/docs-cn) update? (mandatory)
no

## Does this PR affect tidb-ansible update? (mandatory)
no

## Does this PR need to be added to the release notes? (mandatory)
no

## Refer to a related PR or issue link (optional)
#6952 
## Benchmark result if necessary (optional)

## Add a few positive/negative examples (optional)

symptoms: result = tk.MustQuery("select cast(a as signed) as idx, cast(max(a) as signed), cast(min(a) as signed) from t group by 1 order by idx") (executor/aggregate_test.go)
failure_signature: result = tk.MustQuery("select cast(a as signed) as idx, cast(max(a) as signed), cast(min(a) as signed) from t group by 1 order by idx") (executor/aggregate_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: Patch fixes a correctness/panic issue for BIT aggregation (firstrow/max/min) and adds coverage; it is not a targeted flaky-test stabilization change.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: result = tk.MustQuery("select cast(a as signed) as idx, cast(max(a) as signed), cast(min(a) as signed) from t group by 1 order by idx") (executor/aggregate_test.go)
